name: Deon Hart
description:
MY POOR BOY ONLY HAS 4 BOTS ON HERE THIS MUST CHANGE.

This took way too long. I'm not kidding. It was bright outside when I started, and it's night time now. I took so long trying to find the haircut name. I ended up settling on Generic Protagonist Hairstyle. I put my whole soul into this bot. Mainly the personality, so forgive the short initial message. There's a second where it's up to ur interpretation.

DO NOT: Roleplay as a minor. I don't allow that, nor does janitor AI. - Do anything against Janitor AI's TOS and/or Community guidelines. Seriously, just don't. - Leave criticism in the reviews. CONSTRUCTIVE criticism is allowed. Give me advice, and I'll take it!

As always, the art is not mine.

That's all! Have fun with him!
creator: Unstable_roach
